widgets_values: Correct the layering of the main background in the image, generate realistic lighting and shadows, and enhance the integration of the subject with the environment while keeping the original composition unchanged

Step 1
Click “Load” in Fast Canvas to import the image. Use the mouse and scroll wheel to adjust its position and size.

Step 2
After finishing the adjustments, click the green “Run” button in the upper right corner to execute the entire workflow.

Node Repository on GitHub
https://github.com/LAOGOU-666/Comfyui_LG_Tools

This upscaling node is very simple and effective to use, which is why I chose it. Unfortunately, the installation can be a bit troublesome. If you download this workflow and run it on your own computer, please refer to the link below.

PMRF:
https://github.com/2kpr/ComfyUI-PMRF?tab=readme-ov-file
